testcase.name: 1320-dimensions-not-on-all-rule-sets-testcase
Dimensions not on all rule sets
testcase.description:
The example covered in the template is same as given in test case number '1310' in which Dimension "Country" only applies to the left hand column in the X axis breakdown. In this test case Tagged constraint sets are used on Y-axis to create same table. Table Linkbase 1.0 requires same aspects for all constraint sets within a rule node, hence this processing software would encounter xbrlte:constraintSetAspectMismatch
This test case is being written to examine the if there is a distinction to be made between dimensional and non- dimensional aspects for constrained sets

variation.name: Two Columns , Single Row, Constrain Sets on Y-axis
